strengths: Extensive fullstack experience with TypeScript, React, and Node.js across multiple production systems
Proven ability to own end-to-end systems, from APIs to UIs and DevOps infrastructure
Strong open-source contributions and technical communication skills demonstrated through workshops and public projects
concerns: Job titles (e.g., Staff Software Engineer) suggest seniority beyond junior/mid-level scope, raising fit concerns
Limited explicit mention of PostgreSQL, Nest.js, or AWS services as required in job description
German language proficiency is only basic, while high on-site presence in Berlin is required
response.justification: The candidate brings deep fullstack expertise in relevant technologies and a strong track record of building scalable systems, but their seniority level and limited German proficiency raise questions about alignment with the junior/mid-level, on-site role in Berlin.
